SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.service.impl

Package com.hack23.cia.service.impl

package com.hack23.cia.service.impl
This package provides the implementation of various services for the application. Key classes and interfaces: - ApplicationManagerImpl: Implementation of the application manager. - ConfigurationManagerImpl: Implementation of the configuration manager. Dependencies and relationships: - Depends on com.hack23.cia.service.data.api for data access interfaces.

    Description

    This package provides email service implementations for the application.

    This package provides rule implementations for the application.

    This package provides task implementations for the application.
